description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the GO_VERSION variable as 1.10.1 and the stages setup, static, build, test, and deploy. Add a setup_script job in the setup stage using the atlassian/default-image:latest image with the gitlab-org tag that runs ./setup.sh, sources /etc/profile.d/go.sh, and executes go test ./src/sanity/. Add a static_analysis job in the static stage using golang:${GO_VERSION}-stretch that runs ./setup.sh and ./test/scripts/static_analysis.sh. In the test stage add a black_box_test job using golang:${GO_VERSION}-stretch that runs ./setup.sh then ./test/scripts/black_box.sh, and a white_box_test job using the same image that runs ./setup.sh then ./test/scripts/white_box.sh and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. Finally, add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on white_box_test, runs mv coverage/ public/, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact expiring in 30 days, and runs only on the development and master branches.
